params.name: Golden Snail
params.description: This Golden Snail statue is a true masterpiece, crafted using ancient gold-casting techniques that involve casting, hammering, carving, and polishing. Its soft golden hue and unassuming presence exude an air of nobility and grandeur, making it a coveted addition to any collection. Many are drawn to its allure and beauty!
